title: rosa micrantha subsp. calvescens
intro: Rosa micrantha subsp. calvescens, also known as the small-leafed rose or dwarf rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa micrantha subsp. calvescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
